eth0:ethernet:connected:Wired connection 1:/org/freedesktop/NetworkManager/ActiveConnection/0
wlan0:wifi:connected:HomeNetwork:/org/freedesktop/NetworkManager/ActiveConnection/1
usb0:gsm:connected:gsm-connection-0:/org/freedesktop/NetworkManager/ActiveConnection/2
usb1:gsm:connected:gsm-connection-1:/org/freedesktop/NetworkManager/ActiveConnection/3
usb2:gsm:connected:gsm-connection-2:/org/freedesktop/NetworkManager/ActiveConnection/4
lo:loopback:unmanaged::/
